name: Matt Yu
headline: Business Transformation & Operations Leader | Solutions Architect
summaries: I help companies transform their businesses grounded in operations best practices, focused on ROI, and fueled by automation and AI. My background spans business operations, shared services, and enterprise transformation with global experience including US, Canada, APAC and Australia.

As General Manager for Blackbook.ai, I built our Automation & AI capability for our North America operations from the ground up — becoming the primary service‑delivery partner for a U.S.-based RPA firm. I designed a repeatable delivery model (sizing, requirements gathering, solution design, QA, handover), served as the lead architect for all UiPath and Power Platform solutions, and oversaw the build and maintenance of 50+ automations across multiple industries. I also managed pipeline prioritization, scoped new opportunities, and led client‑facing delivery to ensure quality, timelines, and change control.
Born and raised in NYC, I had the incredible opportunity to live and work in Australia, Malaysia and Brazil. After 8+ years abroad, I returned in 2021 and now call Seattle home.

skills.title: I Lead
skills.description: Operations transformation, target operating models, and change management — the business layer that makes automation stick long-term.

skills.title: I Build
skills.description: Self-taught automation architect across UiPath, Power Platform, and Azure — having designed and delivered for 40+ companies.

experience.tagline: Built a US RPA service delivery partnership, architecting & delivering 50+ enterprise automations across UiPath, Power Automate, and Automation Anywhere.
Architected intelligent automation solutions using Microsoft Power Platform for enterprise clients across multiple industries.
Full time dad to infant while abroad during spouse's green card process; managed relocation to US the during the COVID pandemic.
Designed & developed UiPath RPA bots at 20+ major Australian companies spanning financial services, insurance, and more.
Held multiple operations & systems roles including Head of Desktop Automation, Claims Operations Manager, Project Manager and Senior Business Analyst

education.narrative: Most automation practitioners come from engineering. I came from Finance — which means I've always led with ROI, cost modeling, and operational efficiency. The automation and AI layer came later, but the business lens was there from day one.

items.name: Google Cloud Platform Fundamentals: Core Infrastructure

interests.title: Flavor Chaser
interests.description: The best part of living abroad? The flavors! From hawker centers in KL to food stalls in Japan and sidewalk eateries in Vietnam — satisfying the foodie in me, one bite at a time.

interests.title: Racket Sports
interests.description: Pickleball, badminton, and tennis — why pick one when you can play all three?

interests.title: Do This More
interests.description: A month diving the reefs of Thailand is something I'll always treasure. Skiing has that same magic — both are firmly on the 'do this more' list.

interests.title: Nintendo Switch
interests.description: A Yu family staple for Seattle's rainy days — couch co-op, shared victories, and the occasional friendly argument. Highly recommend.
